full_text:
Taoqiu Yi 陶丘一
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Taoqiu Yi (陶丘一)was born in Pingyuan commandery?. In 241, recommended Guan Ning to office. Taoqiu Yi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
